svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize:14;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#1a237e;" value="<b>崩溃恢复流程：Redo 重放 + Undo 回滚</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="420" x="70" y="8" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="crash" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFCDD2;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=11;fontColor=#B71C1C;" value="<b>💥 突然断电</b><br>内存数据全部丢失" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="180" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=10;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="<b>第一步：Redo Log 重放</b><br>从 Checkpoint 之后开始<br>逐条按页号重放物理修改<br>→ 所有已记录修改都恢复了" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="280" x="140" y="115" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="undo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=10;fontColor=#E65100;" value="<b>第二步：Undo Log 回滚</b><br>扫描所有未提交事务<br>用 Undo Log 逆向操作<br>→ 未提交的全部回滚" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="280" x="140" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="result" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1B5E20;" value="<b>✅ 恢复完成</b><br>已提交的 = 不丢<br>未提交的 = 滚回" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="160" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="key" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fillColor=#E8EAF6;strokeColor=none;fontSize=11;fontColor=#1A237E;rounded=1;" value="<b>🔑 Redo = 已提交不丢失 | Undo = 未提交滚回去</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="380" x="100" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="crash" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#C62828;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;" target="redo"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="redo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;" target="undo"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="undo" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#F9A825;strokeWidth=2;endArrow=classic;" target="result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 17px; margin-left: 12px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #1a237e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a237e, #bfc7ff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.b: 崩溃恢复流程：Redo 重放 + Undo 回滚

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 205, 210), rgb(85, 42, 46)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(198, 40, 40), rgb(255, 145, 145));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 72px; margin-left: 121px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #B71C1C;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#B71C1C, #ff9c9c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
💥 突然断电
内存数据全部丢失

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(200, 230, 201), rgb(28, 54, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 142, 60), rgb(83, 157, 86));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 150px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1B5E20;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1B5E20, #82bc86); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第一步：Redo Log 重放
从 Checkpoint 之后开始
逐条按页号重放物理修改
→ 所有已记录修改都恢复了

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 249, 196), rgb(33, 28, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(249, 168, 37), rgb(149, 79, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 245px; margin-left: 81px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #E65100;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#E65100, #fb7b35); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
第二步：Undo Log 回滚
扫描所有未提交事务
用 Undo Log 逆向操作
→ 未提交的全部回滚

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(200, 230, 201), rgb(28, 54, 29)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(56, 142, 60), rgb(83, 157, 86));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 228px; height: 1px; padding-top: 337px; margin-left: 101px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1B5E20;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1B5E20, #82bc86); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
✅ 恢复完成
已提交的 = 不丢
未提交的 = 滚回
